## Contributor checklist

<!-- Tick everything before requesting a review. Unticked boxes will be flagged by your reviewer. -->

- [ ] I branched off `dev`, not `main`
- [ ] My branch name follows the convention (`feature/`, `fix/`, `chore/`)
- [ ] Commits follow the format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:` etc.)
- [ ] No `print()` statements left in code
- [ ] All variables and functions have type hints
- [ ] No magic numbers — constants used where needed
- [ ] I communicated with the team before editing any shared `.tscn` files
- [ ] I tested my changes in Godot before opening this PR

## Reviewer checklist

<!-- For the person reviewing — tick off as you go -->

- [ ] Code follows naming conventions (CONVENTIONS.md)
- [ ] No logic stuffed into the wrong scene or autoload
- [ ] Functions are reasonably short and readable
- [ ] No leftover debug code or placeholder comments
